scope.summary: Prevent SaaS realtime stream event leaks across users by tagging hosted events with owner user_id and filtering SSE frames to the authenticated user.
goals: Hosted realtime message events carry the owning SaaS user id internally
GET /api/v1/realtime emits only events whose user_id matches the authenticated device's user_id
Realtime filtering is proven with an offline unit test
Existing Postgres/MinIO cloud smoke remains green
nonGoals: Changing the SSE client protocol shape for allowed events

acceptance.description: Backend tests pass, including a unit test that drops realtime events for another user.
Backend clippy is clean with warnings denied.
Postgres/MinIO dev smoke remains green after realtime event envelope changes.
